entities.name: Artificial Intelligence
entities.description: A broad field of systems that perform tasks normally requiring human intelligence.

entities.name: Skeleton of Thought
entities.description: A generation strategy that first creates a skeleton and then expands nodes in parallel.

entities.name: Chain of Thought
entities.description: A sequential reasoning style that expands intermediate reasoning steps in order.

entities.name: Graph of Thoughts
entities.description: A reasoning framework that organizes thoughts as graph nodes and dependencies.

entities.name: Knowledge Graph
entities.description: A structured representation of entities and typed relations used for grounding and verification.

entities.name: Directed Acyclic Graph
entities.description: A graph structure whose directed dependencies do not form cycles.

entities.name: Parallel Decoding
entities.description: Expanding independent generation units concurrently.

entities.name: Hallucination
entities.description: Generated content that is unsupported, false, or inconsistent with evidence.

entities.name: Logical Dependency
entities.description: A relation indicating that one thought node should be generated after another.

entities.name: Verification
entities.description: Checking generated claims against evidence or constraints.

entities.name: Entity Linking
entities.description: Mapping words in the user query to knowledge graph entities.

entities.name: KG Retrieval
entities.description: Retrieving relevant triples and paths from the knowledge graph.

entities.name: Thought Node Planning
entities.description: Creating thought nodes before expansion.

entities.name: Evidence Branch
entities.description: A thought node grounded by a specific knowledge graph triple or path.

entities.name: Aggregation
entities.description: Combining expanded thought nodes into the final answer.

entities.name: Constraint Checking
entities.description: Using rules and KG constraints to prune or downgrade invalid nodes.

entities.name: DAG Scheduler
entities.description: Running independent nodes in parallel and dependent nodes in order.

entities.name: Answer Quality
entities.description: The combined quality of factuality, coherence, coverage, and structure.

entities.name: Factuality
entities.description: The degree to which generated text is supported by reliable evidence.

entities.name: Coherence
entities.description: The logical and textual consistency of the generated answer.
